zh.lifeSummary: 當William Covert於大約1449年出生在英國素瑞哈斯可姆時，他的父親John Covert28歲，母親Lady Ann Vaver20歲。他於1477年與Anne Fleming在英國素瑞哈斯可姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1494年9月20日在他的家鄉享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Covert于大约1449年出生在英国素瑞哈斯可姆时，他的父亲John Covert28岁，母亲Lady Ann Vaver20岁。他于1477年与Anne Fleming在英国素瑞哈斯可姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1494年9月20日在他的家乡享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Covert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Surrey, of Norman origin): habitational name from the Norman hamlet of Couvert in Calvados or from some other locality similarly named from Old French (le) covert ‘the secret corner, refuge, or thicket’. Sussex surname forms with the definite article and no preposition are not nicknames from Old French covert ‘secret(ive)’, as has been suggested, but are either references to ‘Le Covert’ as the place of origin or represent the common Norman practice of substituting le for de in surnames. This surname is now extinct in Britain.
Americanized form of an unidentified Dutch or German name, perhaps   Kofoed   or German   Gobert  .

variants.name: Coovert
meanings: Americanized form of French Couvert or its Dutch form Coevert, see Covert .

variants.name: Kofoed
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Nanna.
Danish: from ko ‘cow’ + fod ‘foot’, hence a nickname for someone with a club foot or other deformity of the foot. Compare Kofford .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Covert was born about 1449, in Hascombe, Surrey, England, his father, John Covert, was 28 and his mother, Lady Ann Vaver, was 20. He married Anne Fleming in 1477, in Hascombe, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 September 1494, in his hometown, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Covert est né environ 1449, à Hascombe, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, John Covert, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Ann Vaver, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Anne Fleming en 1477, à Hascombe, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1494, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Covert um 1449 in Hascombe, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Covert 28 und seine Mutter Lady Ann Vaver 20. Er hat 1477 in Hascombe, Surrey, England Anne Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. September 1494 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Covert è nato il circa 1449 nel Hascombe, Surrey, England, il suo padre, John Covert, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lady Ann Vaver, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Anne Fleming nel 1477, nel Hascombe, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 settembre 1494, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Covertが約1449年にイギリススリーハスコンベで生まれた時，父John Covertは28歳，母Lady Ann Vaverは20歳であった。1477年にイギリススリーハスコンベでAnne Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1494年9月20日に故郷で46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Covert(이)가 대략 1449년 영국 수리 하스코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Covert(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Ann Vaver(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1477년 영국 수리 하스코브에서 Anne Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1494년 9월 20일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Covert nasceu aproximadamente 1449, em Hascombe, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Covert, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Ann Vaver, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Fleming em 1477, em Hascombe, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1494, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Covert родился около 1449 г. в местности хаскомб, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени John Covert было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Ann Vaver, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Fleming в 1477 г. в местности хаскомб, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 сентября 1494 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Covert nació aproximadamente 1449, en Hascombe, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, John Covert, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Ann Vaver, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Anne Fleming en 1477, en Hascombe, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1494, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años.
